strategy_name: Evolutionary Trading Algo — 4-Week Synthetic Paper Run Results (Split Verdict)
description: Post-harness review. The synthetic 4-week paper-run harness drove all 6 bots against a GBM-stylized bar stream sized per firm_spec_paper_promotion_v1.json capital allocations. Result: MNQ + NQ clear the paper_phase_requirements gate cleanly (expectancy +0.47R / +0.61R, DD 6.8% / 3.9%, 168 / 140 trades). Crypto_seed + the three casino perps (ETH/SOL/XRP) fail the expectancy_R >= 0.30 gate on synthetic data — crypto_seed 0.15R, eth 0.16R, sol 0.15R, xrp 0.18R. XRP also breaches the 15% DD limit by 0.55pp. Aggregate blended expectancy 0.277R on 973 trades, portfolio grew $27k → $46.97k (+73.96%), no kill-switch events fired.
hypothesis: Futures engine (MNQ) and its NQ scale-out are production-paper-ready on synthetic conditions. Crypto perps need real-venue paper data before a meaningful expectancy verdict — synthetic GBM lacks the funding-rate mean-reversion, sweep liquidity asymmetry, and micro-structure exploits the confluence stack is designed to capture. Recommend promoting MNQ+NQ to live-tiny paper now, holding crypto perps at paper gate until a) real Bybit paper bars replace GBM or b) confluence thresholds are re-fit on real data.

promotion_path_proposed.tier_A_size: MNQ: 1 contract, NQ: 1 contract — 2 weeks live-tiny with Tradovate OAuth2 once credentials land
promotion_path_proposed.tier_B_unblock: Replace synthetic GBM with Bybit paper-endpoint bars, re-run harness, re-review
promotion_path_proposed.rationale: Split the promotion rather than hold everything. The futures path is edge-proven on mechanics; crypto needs a better test surface to evaluate edge, not more infrastructure.

firm_eval_fields.notes: Aggregated across 6 bots. Futures sub-portfolio (MNQ+NQ) expectancy = 0.54R (308 trades). Crypto sub-portfolio expectancy = 0.158R (665 trades). The blended number masks a clean bifurcation — the Firm should evaluate them as two separate promotion requests, not one aggregate.
